subcomponents.label: Subcomponents
subcomponents.children:
<Table.Head>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Header text="Territory ID" />
    <Table.Header text="Name" />
    <Table.Header text="Status" />
    <Table.Header text="Start Date" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
</Table.Head>
<Table.Body>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Cell text="1001" numberSpacing="tabular" />
    <Table.Cell text="Ada Lovelace" />
    <Table.Cell text="Active" />
    <Table.Cell text="Apr 9, 2026" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Cell text="1002" numberSpacing="tabular" />
    <Table.Cell text="Grace Hopper" />
    <Table.Cell text="Pending" />
    <Table.Cell text="Apr 10, 2026" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Cell text="1003" numberSpacing="tabular" />
    <Table.Cell text="Katherine Johnson" />
    <Table.Cell text="Active" />
    <Table.Cell text="Apr 11, 2026" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
</Table.Body>

presets.name: Sticky Columns
presets.children:
<Table.Head>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Header data={{ "sticky-id": "territory" }} text="Territory ID" />
    <Table.Header text="Name" />
    <Table.Header text="Status" />
    <Table.Header data={{ "sticky-id": "started" }} text="Start Date" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
</Table.Head>
<Table.Body>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Cell data={{ "sticky-id": "territory" }} text="1001" numberSpacing="tabular" />
    <Table.Cell text="Ada Lovelace" />
    <Table.Cell text="Active" />
    <Table.Cell data={{ "sticky-id": "started" }} text="Apr 9, 2026" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Cell data={{ "sticky-id": "territory" }} text="1002" numberSpacing="tabular" />
    <Table.Cell text="Grace Hopper" />
    <Table.Cell text="Pending" />
    <Table.Cell data={{ "sticky-id": "started" }} text="Apr 10, 2026" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Cell data={{ "sticky-id": "territory" }} text="1003" numberSpacing="tabular" />
    <Table.Cell text="Katherine Johnson" />
    <Table.Cell text="Active" />
    <Table.Cell data={{ "sticky-id": "started" }} text="Apr 11, 2026" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
</Table.Body>

presets.name: Collapsible Rows
presets.children:
<Table.Head>
  <Table.Row>
    <Table.Header text="Project" />
    <Table.Header text="Owner" />
    <Table.Header text="Status" />
    <Table.Header text="" />
  </Table.Row>
</Table.Head>
<Table.Body>
  <Table.Row
      collapsible
      collapsibleContent={<Card padding="sm"><Body text="Launch plan details" /></Card>}
      sideHighlightColor="primary"
  >
    <Table.Cell text="Launch plan" />
    <Table.Cell text="Ada Lovelace" />
    <Table.Cell text="Active" />
    <Table.Cell text="Details" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
  <Table.Row
      collapsible
      collapsibleContent={<Card padding="sm"><Body text="Migration details" /></Card>}
      sideHighlightColor="info"
  >
    <Table.Cell text="Migration" />
    <Table.Cell text="Grace Hopper" />
    <Table.Cell text="Pending" />
    <Table.Cell text="Details" textAlign="right" />
  </Table.Row>
</Table.Body>

subcomponents.message: Subcomponents keeps the full table markup editable in children, including all rows and cells.

wrapper.message: Wrapper uses the same editable children area with wrapper-level table props.

div_tags.message: Div Tags switches the table and every subcomponent in children to tag="div" together.

sticky_columns.message: Sticky Columns applies matching data-sticky-id values to the header and every row cell in the editable table.

collapsible_rows.message: Collapsible Rows keeps collapsible row content in children so each row can be edited directly.

floating_header.message: Floating Header applies the floating header style in both table props and editable header children.

with_filter.message: With Filter shows the withFilter wrapper while keeping all table children editable.
